4 C 4n

Matched
0 C 0n
1 C 1n
2 C 2n
3 C 3n
4 C 4n
5 AND 04
6 AND 15
7 AND 26

Applying to 11000000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 AND 04 = AND(I 0,I 4) = AND(1,0) = 0
6 AND 15 = AND(I 1,I 5) = AND(1,0) = 0
7 AND 26 = AND(I 2,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
